# Executor

> Executor is an algorithmic trend-following trading strategy that trades BTC futures with 2x leverage, 24/7. This site is its performance dashboard, built from real historical and live trading data (Turkish/English, light/dark theme).

This is a single-page dashboard, not a blog or docs site. Key sections on https://executor-bot.com/:

- Performance: annual/monthly returns, rolling-window analysis, max drawdown, BTC benchmark comparison
- Trades: full historical trade log (entry/exit, PnL, duration), filterable by date
- Analysis: equity curve vs BTC, monthly return heatmap
- Strategy: a plain-language explanation of how Executor trades
- FAQ: who should/shouldn't invest, risk, custody, leverage, profit share, withdrawals, copy trading mechanics
- Guide: step-by-step copy trading setup on Binance/Bybit

## Facts
- Asset traded: BTC only, perpetual futures, max recommended leverage 2x
- Access model: copy trading — funds stay in the user's own exchange account, the system only mirrors trade entries/exits
- Profit share: typically 10% of realized profit, no fee on losing periods
- Historical claim: no losing calendar year on record (per the Performance section data)

## Contact
- Email: alperenlcr@gmail.com

## Notes
Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
